# Import Adapter Compatibility Summary

<!-- Generated by scripts/generate_compatibility_docs.py from sidemantic/formats.py and repository tests. -->

This is the complete registry-level summary for Python import adapters. `Registered` means the CLI
can route the format to its adapter; it does not imply complete source-platform feature parity.
Detailed compatibility documents describe field-level limitations where they exist.

| Format | Aliases | Input | Extensions | Import | Export | Dedicated tests | Detailed compatibility |
|---|---|---|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| `atscale-sml` | `atscale`, `sml` | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 4 | Registry summary only |
| `bsl` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 2 | Registry summary only |
| `cube` | `cubejs`, `cube-js` | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 9 | [Detailed guide](cube.md) |
| `gooddata` | `good-data` | `file_or_directory` | `.json` | Registered | Yes | 2 | Registry summary only |
| `graphene` | `gsql` | `file_or_directory` | `.gsql` | Registered | No | 1 | [Detailed guide](graphene.md) |
| `hex` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 6 | Registry summary only |
| `holistics` | `aml` | `file_or_directory` | `.aml` | Registered | Yes | 4 | Registry summary only |
| `lookml` | `looker` | `file_or_directory` | `.lkml` | Registered | Yes | 8 | [Detailed guide](lookml.md) |
| `malloy` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.malloy` | Registered | Yes | 10 | [Detailed guide](malloy.md) |
| `metricflow` | `dbt`, `dbt-semantic-layer` | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 5 | Registry summary only |
| `omni` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 4 | Registry summary only |
| `osi` | `open-semantic-interchange` | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml`, `.json` | Registered | Yes | 3 | [Detailed guide](osi.md) |
| `rill` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 8 | Registry summary only |
| `sidemantic` | `native` | `file` | `.yml`, `.yaml`, `.sql` | Registered | Yes | 1 | Registry summary only |
| `snowflake` | `cortex`, `snowflake-cortex` | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 7 | Registry summary only |
| `superset` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 5 | Registry summary only |
| `tableau` | — | `file_or_directory` | `.tds`, `.twb`, `.tdsx`, `.twbx` | Registered | No | 4 | Registry summary only |
| `thoughtspot` | `thought-spot`, `tml` | `file_or_directory` | `.tml`, `.yml`, `.yaml` | Registered | Yes | 3 | Registry summary only |
| `tmdl` | `powerbi`, `power-bi` | `file_or_directory` | `.tmdl` | Registered | Yes | 3 | Registry summary only |
| `yardstick` | `yardstick-sql` | `file_or_directory` | `.sql` | Registered | No | 1 | [Detailed guide](yardstick.md) |

The native `sidemantic` adapter is included because it participates in the same conversion registry.
Adapters without a detailed guide are intentionally labeled summary-only; their test count is an
inventory signal, not a claim that every upstream feature is supported.
